composition.note: Pass 47 reference composition: source-anchored regions only.

regions.name: viewport_rect_placeholder
regions.source_anchor: COORD.C G2067=0, G2068=33; DEFS.H C112_BYTE_WIDTH_VIEWPORT*2=224, C136_HEIGHT_VIEWPORT=136
regions.note: Viewport CONTENT is DRAWVIEW.C/DUNVIEW.C runtime output; not synthesisable without an engine. Grid marks the exact DEFS.H-anchored viewport boundary for overlay calibration.

regions.name: message_area_rect_placeholder
regions.source_anchor: COORD.C G2092_MessageAreaWidth=320, G2091 via M075 => line height 7; viewport end row=168
regions.note: Text content is runtime-produced; reference shows only the boundary strip.

blocked_on_zones_h.name: side_column_backdrop_position
blocked_on_zones_h.reason: ZONES.H layout record not in local ReDMCSB dump; side column width (96px) != panel graphic width (144px) => placement requires zone-level evidence.
blocked_on_zones_h.suggested_followup: extract ZONES.H (or parse PANEL.C + COORD.C layout-record init path) to recover pixel x/y for C101_ZONE_PANEL and the champion-box zones.

honesty.what_this_is: A source-anchored 320x200 reference canvas + per-graphic palettized PNGs suitable for pixel-diff overlays of panel chrome and individual graphic blits.
honesty.what_this_is_not: A full ReDMCSB frame render, an emulator capture, or a claim that the viewport content is known without an engine. Viewport content placeholders are clearly marked.

blockers_remaining.name: side_column_backdrop_position
blockers_remaining.reason: ZONES.H layout record not in local ReDMCSB dump; side column width (96px) != panel graphic width (144px) => placement requires zone-level evidence.
blockers_remaining.suggested_followup: extract ZONES.H (or parse PANEL.C + COORD.C layout-record init path) to recover pixel x/y for C101_ZONE_PANEL and the champion-box zones.

blockers_remaining.name: viewport_dungeon_content
blockers_remaining.reason: Requires a runnable engine (DM1 DOS binary under DOSBox or a ReDMCSB headless build). See scripts/dosbox_dm1_capture.sh for the DOSBox path.

blockers_remaining.name: runtime_text_content
blockers_remaining.reason: TEXT.C / TEXT2.C glyph rendering is content-dependent; font atlas is extracted (GRAPHICS.DAT index varies) but string placement is zone-driven.
